premiumReasons.title: Aspirational Power
premiumReasons.description: "Genius" is one of the strongest, most emotionally charged words in the English language. It instantly signals excellence, rarity, and transformation.

premiumReasons.title: Linguistic Strength
premiumReasons.description: Short, rhythmic, memorable, and ownable. It feels both timeless and contemporary — the rare name that sounds established on day one.

premiumReasons.title: Multi-Layered Depth
premiumReasons.description: Works literally (mineral foundation for cognition), metaphorically (the seasoning that brings out brilliance), philosophically (spark + embodiment), and culturally (wit and essence).

premiumReasons.title: Market Positioning
premiumReasons.description: Perfectly aligned with high-value, high-growth categories: peak performance & biohacking, AI + human augmentation, creativity & innovation, high-end education, thought leadership, and premium wellness.

premiumReasons.title: Development Advantage
premiumReasons.description: Instantly projects authority and ambition. Ideal for product lines, media platforms, SaaS tools, coaching brands, or institutional ventures.

premiumReasons.title: Scarcity
premiumReasons.description: A unique, evocative pairing unlikely to be matched. "Genius" domains have historically commanded strong prices when they offer clear brand equity.

brandApplications.title: Premium Nootropic & Supplement Lines
brandApplications.description: Cognitive "genius salt" formulations, electrolyte blends, or nootropic stacks. The name literally describes a product that fuels exceptional mental performance.

brandApplications.title: Peak Performance Coaching
brandApplications.description: Flow-state training, executive optimization platforms, or high-performance coaching brands. Genius Salt is the catalyst that transforms potential into sustained output.

brandApplications.title: AI Tools & Interfaces
brandApplications.description: Platforms designed to amplify human genius through artificial intelligence. Positioned at the frontier where human and machine intelligence converge.

brandApplications.title: Creativity & Innovation Platforms
brandApplications.description: Communities, tools, or ecosystems built around invention, creative problem-solving, and breakthrough thinking. The name that houses big ideas.

brandApplications.title: High-End Education & Gifted Programs
brandApplications.description: Academies, curricula, or talent-development initiatives for exceptional minds. The essential seasoning that brings out brilliance in every student.

brandApplications.title: Thought Leadership & Publishing
brandApplications.description: Media platforms, podcasts, or publishing houses focused on exceptional minds and transformative ideas. An instantly authoritative brand for serious intellectual content.
